llmRecommendations.overallAssessment: Memory system is critically degraded at health score 39/100, with unresolved contradictions posing immediate decision risk and severely oversized role files (researcher_ml_lead.md at 6x limit) likely burying critical operational context. The 9 unindexed feedback files mean hard-won behavioral rules are invisible to the system.
llmRecommendations.topPriority: Resolve the 2 contradictions immediately — conflicting state in a trading AI memory system can directly cause wrong strategy or infrastructure decisions.

recommendations.action: Locate and resolve both contradictions by auditing conflicting files, then document the authoritative resolution with a timestamp.
recommendations.reason: Contradictions are the only issue class that can cause actively wrong decisions rather than merely stale or missing ones. In a trading context this means potential misallocated compute, wrong signals, or incorrect strategy parameters.

recommendations.action: Add all 9 missing feedback files (feedback_ssh_pooling.md, feedback_use_qcc.md, feedback_ray_*, etc.) to INDEX.md immediately.
recommendations.reason: Feedback files encode behavioral rules the system must follow. All 9 are completely invisible to navigation, meaning SSH/Ray/infrastructure constraints are being silently ignored on every session that doesn't happen to load those files directly.

recommendations.action: Split researcher_ml_lead.md (1858 lines, 6x limit) and researcher_quant_lead.md (1285 lines, 4x limit) into role-summary + appendix or archive files.
recommendations.reason: Files this far over the 300-line limit degrade retrieval quality and likely contain months of mixed active/stale content. The MANDATORY QUEUE OBLIGATION sections in both are also 139h stale, meaning active task queues may be wrong.

recommendations.action: Audit and refresh the 8 stale files with ages over 477h (backtest_results.md, INDEX.md, lvl3quant.md, teleclaude.md, wf_training.md, aeroforge_cad.md, autonomous_mode.md, lvl3quant sections), archiving any that are no longer actionable.
recommendations.reason: Compute allocation, backtest results, and training workflow docs that are 20-30 days stale will cause the system to plan against infrastructure and strategy state that no longer exists.

recommendations.action: Deduplicate the 6 duplicate entries and trim INDEX.md from 293 to under 150 lines by removing stale or redundant pointers.
recommendations.reason: INDEX.md is the navigation hub with a hard 200-line render limit; at 293 lines the bottom ~100 lines are truncated every session, making those references permanently inaccessible regardless of their content quality.
